title: pterocephalus nestorianus
intro: Pterocephalus nestorianus, also known as the Chinese buttonbush or button bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pterocephalus nestorianus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. It is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and has also been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs and skin conditions.
